sources.expression: $wpdb->get_results( "SELECT * FROM $feeds_posts_table_name ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;" )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT * FROM $table_name ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;" )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE post_id = %d
		  	AND feed_id = %s", $this->feed_details['location']['post_id'], $this->feed_details['feed_id'] ),ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT id
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE html_location = 'unknown'
			AND last_update < %s
			AND feed_id = %s
			AND post_id = %d
			LIMIT 1;", $one_day_ago, $feed_id, $post_id ),ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "
			SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE html_location = 'content'
            ", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "
			SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE html_location != 'content'
            AND html_location != 'unknown'
            GROUP BY feed_id
            ", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE html_location IN ('$in')
		  	$group_by
		  	ORDER BY last_update ASC",ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE shortcode_atts = %s
		  	AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
		  	$group_by
		  	LIMIT %d
			OFFSET %d;", $args['shortcode_atts'], CTF_Db::RESULTS_PER_PAGE, $offset ),ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE feed_id = %s
		  	AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
		  	$group_by
		  	LIMIT %d
			OFFSET %d;", $args['feed_id'], CTF_Db::RESULTS_PER_PAGE, $offset ),ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "
			SELECT *
			FROM $feed_locator_table_name
			WHERE feed_id NOT LIKE '*%'
		  	AND html_location IN ( '$location_string' )
		  	$group_by
		  	LIMIT $limit
			OFFSET $offset;", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE shortcode_atts = %s
            ", $args['shortcode_atts'] ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_entries
            FROM $feed_locator_table_name
            WHERE feed_id = %s
            ", $args['feed_id'] ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "
		SELECT option_name
        FROM $wpdb->options
        WHERE `option_name` LIKE ('%\_transient\_ctf\_%')
        AND `option_name` NOT LIKE ('%\_transient\_ctf\_header%');", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT * FROM $feeds_posts_table_name
                        WHERE id = %s AND type = %s and term = %s LIMIT 1", $this->storage_data['id'], $this->endpoint, $this->term ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
				$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $posts_table_name as p
					LEFT JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name as f ON p.id = f.id
					WHERE f.type = %s AND f.term = %s ORDER BY p.time_stamp DESC LIMIT 150;", $type, $term ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT * FROM $posts_table_name as p
				LEFT JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name as f ON p.id = f.id
				WHERE $escaped_where_clause_string ORDER BY p.time_stamp DESC LIMIT 150;", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_var("
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM $table_name
        WHERE option_name LIKE '%ctf_!%'
        ")

				$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $posts_table_name as p
					LEFT JOIN $feeds_posts_table_name as f ON p.id = f.id
					WHERE f.type = %s AND f.term = %s ORDER BY p.time_stamp DESC LIMIT 150;", $type, $term ), ARRAY_A )
